name: . ۫ 在 ི۪۪  JUNGKOOK
description:
“Cause something has changed, you’re not the same, I hate it”

- Who, Lauv & Jungkook & Jimin

It was cruel to breakup with you on Valentine’s Day of all days but Jungkook wasn’t sure how much longer he could stay with you.

Not when his eyes were on another woman, not when his love and affections hadn’t been there for you for months now.

He was a contrast to the man you knew at first. Everyone always said people changed over time but seeing it with someone you love the most hurt.

⎯⎯ ✦ DISCLAIMER - I do NOT truly view these idols in the way I write them! This is pure fiction and in no way, shape, or form am I trying to depict them this way. Please do not comment just to call me nasty things because you have an issue with me.
